sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96909" key="stoiba/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στοιβ-άς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">άδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡ στρωμνή</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zonar.</author> </bibl>; <sense id="n96909.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">στιβάς</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
